//: Optional config for cc-reports. Drop this as config.json to enable.
//display_name: Header greeting name. Leave empty to auto-resolve: git user.name -> OS full name -> login name.

project_aliases.//: Rename a project (applies to cwd basename OR first-level subdir).

root_file_projects: When cwd is a multi-project workspace, files at cwd root matched by regex → logical project name.

cwd_overrides.//: Force a specific absolute cwd (checked against the session's launch anchor first, then current cwd) to a project name, bypassing auto-detection.
cwd_overrides.//example2: use this when auto-detection picks the wrong name

session_overrides.//: Pin a specific sessionId to a project (highest priority). For sessions that hop across many projects; `cc-reports doctor` prints these for you.

//fallback_projects: Names treated as non-project buckets: they sink to the bottom, never win the multi-project vote, and the widget warns when they dominate. Defaults to root files / general / claude-config; set the array below to extend.
